title: ceratostylis macra
intro: Ceratostylis macra, also known as the lesser orchid, is a species of flowering plant in the family Orchidaceae. The plant has been found to possess medicinal properties, with its roots and leaves used in traditional medicine to treat various ailments. Research has shown that Ceratostylis macra has anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which can provide several health benefits, including the treatment of wounds, skin infections, and respiratory issues. The plant can be prepared as an herbal remedy through infusions, decoctions, or tinctures, which are often used to take advantage of its medicinal properties and health benefits.
